title: Victor the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Victor, thirteenth bishop of Rome, wrote, On the Paschal Controversy and some other small works.
He ruled the church for ten years in the reign of the Emperor Severus.
